---
title: "Publications"
format:
  html:
    include-after-body: ../_includes/listing-url-filter.html
listing:
  id: pubs
  contents: "20*.qmd"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
  image-height: "240px"
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description, date, categories]
page-layout: full
---

For the full and current list, see my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.be/citations?user=_c_5EIoAAAAJ). Download [all citations (BibTeX)](../publications.bib).
